notes: CITATION UPGRADE: Replaces Stanford_Archive_Holman. Woo YJ, Reitz BA, 'One Hundred Years of History at Stanford University: Thoracic and Cardiovascular Surgery,' Semin Thorac Cardiovasc Surg 2015;27(4):388-97. Documents Holman as first chairman of the Department of Surgery at Stanford (1926-1955), educated at Stanford and Johns Hopkins, trained by Halsted and later Cushing. He performed extracardiac and closed heart procedures and served as the 33rd AATS president. Original expansion target T3-02 proposed adding Holman→successor chain but the post-Holman general surgery succession (Roy Cohn, James Mark) lacks PMID-documented training relationships. The Shumway cardiac surgery chain is already well-represented in the graph. Target downgraded to citation upgrade only. TARGET MODULE: 02_general_surgery_spread (REPLACES existing edge)
